# High Resolution Camera

**Summary**: A high-speed or high-definition imaging system used to visually capture and identify flow patterns in real-time.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2018-al-dogail|Al-Dogail, 2018]] used a high-resolution camera to visualize and categorize flow regimes in the horizontal pipe.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The camera allowed for the identification of distinct transitions between slug, annular, and stratified flows across various fluid concentrations. ([[2018-al-dogail|Al-Dogail, 2018, p. 45]])
